Jakob's 乔卡 workbook sheet still requires direct inspection; current records use independent web, chart, and in-game sources.
Kaze's 凉风 workbook sheet and its four level/stat notes still require direct inspection; the current carryover rules are independently corroborated by Fire Emblem Wiki prose and Serenes Forest data.
